text:

Log:
  MFH: r418728

  sysutils/*exfat*: update to 1.2.4

  - Chase project move to GitHub
  - Chase patent licensing URL [1]
  - Restore GPLv2 after r328060 [2]
  - Fix build on DragonFly
  - Drop unused iconv dependency
